title: Stennes (disambiguation)
content:
'''Stennes''' or '''Stenness''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Stenness]]''', a location in [[the galaxy]]
*The '''[[Stennes Shifter]]s''', a sentient species

==Legends==
*'''[[Ambria system/Legends|Ambria system]]''', referred to also as the Stenness system
*'''[[Aweris system]]''', referred to also as the Stenness system
*'''[[Stennes]]''', an alien species from [[Stennaros/Legends|Stennaros]], in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]
*The [[Har Worlds|'''Stennes sector''']], a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the Expansion Region
*'''[[Stennes Shifter/Legends|Stennes Shifter]]''', another alien species from Stennaros
*'''[[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] also referred to as "Stenness"
*'''[[Stenness Node]]''', a group of [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] in the Inner Rim, also collectively known as the '''Stenness System(s)'''
*'''[[Stenness pie]]''', a baked dessert

{{Disambig}}
